summary: Tested AsyncStorage persistence fix for Today tab. All 5 tests passed. Input values persist after tab switches, logged sets persist after multi-tab switches, Today page loads without crash, and all other tabs load without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: AsyncStorage implementation is correct: lazy:false in _layout.tsx, saveSetValuesToStorage on change, saveLoggedSetsToStorage after LOG, restore on mount, clear on date change and on finish.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AsyncStorage persistence for today.tsx is working. Test 1 (input persistence), Test 2 (logged set persistence), Test 3 (multi-tab switch), Test 4 (no crash), Test 5 (no regression) all passed. Used credentials: user_a@theprogram.app / StrongmanA123.
